name: Guodong Chen
title: Electrical Engineering Student
subtitle: Bachelor of Electrical Engineering (Honours)
tagline: RMIT University third-year student with practical engineering internship experience in rail hardware installation, maintenance support, and system troubleshooting.
taglineZh: RMIT University 电气工程三年级学生，具备轨道交通硬件安装、维护支持与系统故障排查的现场实习经验。
intro: 我目前就读于 RMIT University 电气工程荣誉学士三年级，GPA 3.0。实习经历聚焦于轨道交通项目中的硬件安装、维护整改、部件级故障排查、质量控制与物料协调。
introEn: I am currently a third-year Bachelor of Electrical Engineering (Honours) student at RMIT University with a GPA of 3.0. My internship experience focuses on rail project hardware installation, maintenance rectification, component-level troubleshooting, quality control, and parts coordination.
aboutHeading: Electrical Engineering Study and Practical System Support
aboutHeadingZh: 电气工程学习与现场系统支持
aboutLead: 我希望把课堂中的工程基础、现场实习中的执行经验，以及清晰的技术沟通结合起来，持续提升在电气系统、维护支持和工程协作中的能力。
aboutLeadEn: I aim to combine engineering fundamentals, hands-on internship execution, and clear technical communication to keep improving in electrical systems, maintenance support, and engineering collaboration.
aboutCallout: 目前开放实习、项目合作和早期工程岗位机会，欢迎 HR 或招聘团队联系我，讨论电气工程、轨道系统、维护支持和项目协调相关机会。
aboutCalloutEn: Open to internship, project, and early-career engineering opportunities. HR and hiring teams are welcome to contact me for roles in electrical engineering, rail systems, maintenance support, and project coordination.

summary.zh: 目前就读于 RMIT University 电气工程荣誉学士三年级，GPA 3.0。
summary.en: Currently studying a Bachelor of Electrical Engineering (Honours) at RMIT University, third year, GPA 3.0.

summary.zh: 自 2023 年 3 月至今在 CRRC Logistics 实习，支持 Melbourne HCMT 项目。
summary.en: Engineering intern at CRRC Logistics from Mar 2023 to Current, supporting the Melbourne HCMT project.

summary.zh: 具备主驾 cab 硬件安装、维护整改、部件级故障排查、质量控制与物料协调经验。
summary.en: Practical experience across driver's cabin hardware installation, maintenance and rectification tasks, component-level troubleshooting, quality control, and logistics coordination.

focus.zh: 维护支持与故障排查实践

experience.description: Supporting engineering delivery, maintenance, rectification, and logistics activities for high-capacity metro train work.
experience.descriptionZh: 参与高容量地铁列车项目中的工程交付、维护整改、故障排查与物流协调支持。

highlights.zh: 支持主驾 cab 硬件安装工作。
highlights.en: Supported hardware installation for the main driver's cabin.

highlights.zh: 协助维护、整改与部件级故障排查任务。
highlights.en: Assisted with maintenance, rectification, and component-level troubleshooting tasks.

highlights.zh: 参与控制柜接线修改工作。
highlights.en: Participated in control cabinet wiring modification work.

highlights.zh: 协助侧装屏幕改造与调整。
highlights.en: Assisted with side-mounted screen retrofit adjustments.

highlights.zh: 支持物料处理、库存协调、审查与质量控制。
highlights.en: Supported material handling, inventory coordination, auditing, and quality control.

projects.title: Melbourne HCMT 硬件安装支持
projects.description: 在 Melbourne High Capacity Metro Train 项目中支持硬件安装和维护相关工作。
projects.descriptionEn: Hands-on support for hardware installation and maintenance activities on Melbourne's High Capacity Metro Train project.

projects.title: 控制柜接线修改
projects.description: 参与接线修改工作，关注安装准确性、记录与质量检查。
projects.descriptionEn: Participated in wiring modification work with attention to installation accuracy, documentation, and quality checks.

projects.title: 侧装屏幕改造支持
projects.description: 在工程更新工作中协助侧装屏幕系统的改造与调整。
projects.descriptionEn: Assisted with retrofit and adjustment tasks for side-mounted screen systems during engineering update work.

projects.title: 零件与库存协调
projects.description: 支持物流熟悉、物料处理和工程活动中的库存协调。
projects.descriptionEn: Supported logistics familiarisation, material handling, and inventory coordination for engineering activities.

selfEvaluation.zh: 学习方向清晰，能够把电气工程课程基础与现场工程任务结合起来。
selfEvaluation.en: I have a clear learning direction and can connect electrical engineering coursework with practical engineering tasks.

selfEvaluation.zh: 实习中重视执行准确性、质量检查和问题记录，适合参与维护、安装和排查类任务。
selfEvaluation.en: During internship work, I value execution accuracy, quality checks, and issue recording, especially in maintenance, installation, and troubleshooting tasks.

selfEvaluation.zh: 愿意在团队中主动沟通，持续补齐工程实践、技术文档和系统理解能力。
selfEvaluation.en: I am willing to communicate proactively in teams and keep improving engineering practice, technical documentation, and system understanding.
